# POKEMONMINI

These paths are relative to `units/POKEMONMINI/` in the TRSE tree. Reference a unit with `@use "<path>"` (no `.tru` extension).

## Units

Each section lists **`procedure` and `function` declarations** parsed from the `.tru` source. **Notes** come from the **block comment** immediately above each declaration (`/** ‚Ä¶ */` or `/* ‚Ä¶ */`). Line comments (`//`) are not shown.

### `screen`

| Kind | Name | Signature | Notes |
|------|------|-----------|-------|
| `procedure` | `VidLin` | `procedure VidLin() inline;` | ‚Äî |
| `procedure` | `SetScreenPos` | `procedure SetScreenPos(src:global pointer);` | ‚Äî |
| `procedure` | `Init` | `procedure Init() inline;` | ‚Äî |
| `procedure` | `SetTileMode` | `procedure SetTileMode();` | ‚Äî |
| `procedure` | `VSync` | `procedure VSync();` | ‚Äî |
